_README: Template for a per-user app config: configs/config-<user>.json (read by app-cli, app-agent, app-electron).
Copy to config-<yourname>.json and edit `name` + `categories` for this machine.

`categories[].path` = an absolute folder Jamat scans for projects; replace the examples with your own (Windows e.g. C:\Code\projects, macOS/Linux e.g. /home/you/code). `hiddenFolders` and `virtualFolders` are optional.
SECRETS DO NOT GO HERE. The Claude.ai usage credentials live in a gitignored sibling file
core/config.ts merges that overlay at load time as a sibling next to the config file (never git, never bundled into the exe).
Omit the .local.json entirely and the usage dashboard is simply empty — everything else still works.
"dockerIsolation": false hides the start menu's Docker-isolation offer (the "Isolated (Docker)?" create prompt + the 🐳 marker) — set it on machines without Docker. Absent/true = offered (default).

"sessionDonePrompts" are the one-click quick prompts in the bottom-right popup that appears (Electron) when a Claude session finishes a non-trivial turn on the active tab. Each {label,prompt} is typed into the session + Enter on click. Omit to use a small built-in default. The popup is toggled in app Settings → Notifications.

"customMenus" add your own per-project actions to the start menu — press F3 on a (non-Docker-isolated) project to open them. Each node is either a GROUP { label, items:[...] } that opens a sub-menu, or a COMMAND { label, run:{ command, args, cwd } } that runs against the selected project. Placeholders {dir} (absolute project path) and {name} (folder name) are substituted in args/cwd. Groups nest freely. Example: [ { "label": "Deploy", "items": [ { "label": "Build", "run": { "command": "npm", "args": ["run", "build"], "cwd": "{dir}" } } ] } ]. Empty/absent = no custom actions (default).

"selfUpdate" picks the update channel. "provider": "github" (default for a public install) auto-updates the PACKAGED app from this project's GitHub Releases (Windows + Linux; macOS needs a signed build). "provider": "vcs" instead pulls a source checkout via git/svn + relaunch — for running from source: { "provider": "vcs", "vcs": "git", "repoPath"?: "..." }. Add "autoCheck": false to silence the background check.
(The :3500 remote-server proxy has its own deploy config — see app-agent/config-remote.example.json — it is NOT a per-user app config.)
name: Example
